

```markdown
---
title: "Track B (single-ROI): Descriptive trajectory via GAM"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
Descriptively visualize how the ROI/feature behaves across age-at-assessment using:
- participant spaghetti (two-wave),
- a GAM smooth over age-at-assessment,
- optional group-stratified smooths.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(mgcv)
library(tibble)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "plot_helpers.R"))

in_dir <- here::here("outputs", "trackB_singleROI")
out_dir <- in_dir
dat_roi_only <- readRDS(file.path(in_dir, "dat_roi_only_long_2waves.rds"))

# ---- 1) Fit GAM (overall) ----
g_overall <- mgcv::gam(ROI_mean ~ s(Age_at_assessment, k = 10),
                       data = dat_roi_only, method = "REML")

# Save summaries
capture.output(summary(g_overall), file = file.path(out_dir, "GAM_overall_summary.txt"))
capture.output(mgcv::gam.check(g_overall), file = file.path(out_dir, "GAM_overall_gamcheck.txt"))

# ---- 2) Spaghetti + smooth plots ----
p_overall <- plot_spaghetti_with_gam(
  dat = dat_roi_only,
  x = "Age_at_assessment",
  y = "ROI_mean",
  id = "ID",
  gam_model = g_overall,
  title = "Single-feature trajectory across age (two-wave observations)",
  xlab = "Age at assessment",
  ylab = "Feature/ROI value"
)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "spaghetti_gam_overall.png"),
       p_overall, width = 9, height = 6.5, dpi = 300)

p_overall


# If you have a grouping variable (e.g., Sex), fit group-specific smooths:
if ("Sex" %in% names(dat_roi_only)) {
  g_by_group <- mgcv::gam(ROI_mean ~ Sex + s(Age_at_assessment, by = Sex, k = 10),
                          data = dat_roi_only, method = "REML")
  capture.output(summary(g_by_group), file = file.path(out_dir, "GAM_byGroup_summary.txt"))

  p_by_group <- plot_spaghetti_with_gam_by_group(
    dat = dat_roi_only,
    x = "Age_at_assessment",
    y = "ROI_mean",
    id = "ID",
    group = "Sex",
    gam_model = g_by_group,
    title = "Single-feature trajectory by group (descriptive)",
    xlab = "Age at assessment",
    ylab = "Feature/ROI value"
  )

  ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "spaghetti_gam_byGroup.png"),
         p_by_group, width = 9, height = 6.5, dpi = 300)

  p_by_group
}
